flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Dakota College at Bottineau fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (490 → 399).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Dakota College at Bottineau fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (72.8% → 63.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Dakota College at Bottineau fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Dakota College at Bottineau rose 27% between 2006 and 2009 (30.3% → 38.3%).
